title: Mysterious Altar
text: You find an ancient altar pulsing with dark energy. An inscription reads: 'Sacrifice to gain power.'

choices.resultText: A relic materializes from the altar's smoke.
A card is purged from your deck by the altar's power.
You walk away, the altar's glow fading behind you.

title: Trapped Merchant
text: A merchant is caught in a cursed cage. He pleads for help.

choices.resultText: The grateful merchant gives you a random card before fleeing.

choices.text: Try to break the cage (50% chance)
choices.resultText: You free the merchant and receive a relic!
You continue on, ignoring his cries.

title: Cursed Library
text: Dusty shelves of forbidden tomes stretch before you. Knowledge beckons.

choices.resultText: You learn a powerful spell from the grimoire.
You learn to unbind a curse from one of your cards.
The burning books reveal hidden treasure!

title: Wounded Warrior
text: A fellow cursed knight lies injured against the wall. Their armor bears the same curse as yours.

choices.resultText: They give you a relic in gratitude before collapsing.
You salvage 25 gold from their gear.
You move on, the warrior's fate unknown.

title: Shadow Market
text: A marketplace run by shadowy figures appears from nowhere. Strange deals await.

choices.resultText: A random card in your deck is upgraded!
You receive 60 gold for your blood.
The market dissolves into shadows.

title: Haunted Chamber
text: Ghosts swirl around you, whispering secrets of the castle's corruption.

choices.resultText: The ghosts reveal hidden gold!
You battle the spirits and emerge victorious!
You escape with your life but no rewards.

title: Cursed Fountain
text: A fountain flows with dark liquid. The curse in your veins resonates with it.

choices.resultText: The liquid heals your wounds! +25 HP
The fountain purges a card from your deck.
You continue onward.

title: Old Graveyard
text: Graves stretch before you, some cracked open. One bears your family name.

choices.resultText: You find a family heirloom among the bones!
You feel a warmth as your ancestors bless you. +10 HP
Something about this place unsettles you.
